description: Legal document in Arabic script. Mentions a date (Dhū l-Hijja 537 AH = June/July 1143 CE) in l. 6. Contains detailed summaries of business transactions and mentions Yūsuf b. Ibrāhīm (l. 9) and Yaḥyā b. Muḥammad (end of line 11). Needs further examination
description_he: מסמך משפטי בערבית מהמאה ה-12. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
